title: NAVIGATOR PROGRAM - 211info
text: OREGON LATINO HEALTH COALITION NAVIGATOR PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to help clients navigate through the Oregon Health Plan (OHP) application process, including enrollment assistance, plan selection, and follow-up. 245 S Bancroft Street Suite E Portland, OR 97239 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (971) 229-0482 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 229-0482 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas and Multnomah Counties Services: Navigator Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON LATINO HEALTH COALITION
